## Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Include pseudocode or API sketches if relevant.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Links to papers, related issues, or prior art.
